node.html:
Develop cloud-native backend services in Go and Python for Arctic Wolf's cybersecurity platform, processing billions of security events daily.

  • Built distributed streaming and correlation pipelines using Kafka, AWS, Kubernetes, Redis, and Docker
  • Designed microservices that transform raw telemetry into actionable threat intelligence for security analysts
  • Developed event-driven APIs and services for real-time analytics, contextual enrichment, and investigation workflows
  • Improved reliability and observability through monitoring, logging, alerting, and CI/CD automation with Jenkins

Developed backend microservices for identity, authentication, authorization, and compliance across Hootsuite's platform.

  • Built scalable APIs for identity lifecycle management, access control, and enterprise account administration
  • Delivered cloud-native services on AWS and Kubernetes for multi-tenant SaaS security workflows
  • Improved operational reliability through observability, deployment automation, and performance tuning
  • Contributed to architecture discussions for extensible platform services and future automation capabilities

Built distributed backend systems supporting enterprise risk data management and analytics used by internal trading and risk teams.

  • Contributed to a centralized risk reference data platform improving consistency and accessibility across business lines
  • Implemented automated testing frameworks for microservices, reducing validation effort by over 90%
  • Integrated new reference data sources for improved counterparty credit risk reporting across five lines of business
  • Enhanced CI/CD and platform automation to improve release quality, delivery efficiency, and operational stability
